category_sources: source_facts.description: read, write, modify, and display EXIF data on the command line.
source_facts.homepage is the official libexif project site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official libexif/exif project documentation entry point.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/libexif/exif, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies EXIF read, write, modify, and display behavior.
source_facts.executables lists the exif command-line tool.
